parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "query": "Brand voice, messaging tone, unique value propositions, differentiation, keywords, past RSA performance",
  "k": 15,
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "campaign_brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.campaign_brief) ?? null) }},
  "keyword": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword) ?? null) }},
  "platform": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platform }}"
}

={
  "agent": "creative-director",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "task": {{ JSON.stringify('Generate RSA 15-headline matrix for campaign: ' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.campaign_brief + ' (keyword: ' + ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword || 'none') + '). Structure: 5 headlines grouped as {brand, benefit, feature, CTA, social_proof}. Max 30 chars each, orthogonal, apply Schwartz emotional triggers, align brand voice. Output JSON with headline_matrix[5][3], validation_notes, estimated CTR vs existing.') }},
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "campaign_brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.campaign_brief) ?? null) }},
  "keyword": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword) ?? null) }},
  "platform": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platform }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}",
  "context": { "smoke_test": {{ ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || "").startsWith("smoke-") }} },
  "extra": { "brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json) ?? null) }}, "brand": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Client Brain: Brand Context').item.json) ?? null) }} }
}

={
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "campaign_id": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.campaign_brief) ?? null) }},
  "headline_set": {
    "set_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
    "headlines": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.headlines) ?? null) }},
    "category_breakdown": "5 headlines x 3 groupings",
    "validation_status": {{ $('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.validation_passed ? '"passed"' : '"failed"' }},
    "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
  },
  "keyword": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword) ?? null) }},
  "platform": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platform }}",
  "headline_count": {{ $('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.headline_count }},
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}"
}

={
  "task_type": "rsa_generation",
  "agent_slug": "creative-director",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "task_input": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.campaign_brief) ?? null) }},
  "output_summary": {{ JSON.stringify('RSA matrix: ' + ($('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.headline_count || 0) + ' headlines, keyword=' + ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword || 'none')) }},
  "success": {{ $('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.validation_passed }},
  "duration_ms": 0,
  "cost_usd": 0,
  "platform": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platform }}"
}

={"from":"rsa-generator","to":"leader","type":"approval","taskId":"{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}","subject":"RSA Pendiente Aprobacion: {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword }}","body":"Cliente: {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }} | Keyword: {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.keyword }} | Headlines: {{ $('Code: Validate RSA Matrix').item.json.headline_count }} generadas. Ver en plataforma para aprobar o rechazar. Task: {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}"}
